description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house surrounded by a variety of trees and landscaping. The structure features multiple interconnected volumes with a mix of flat and gable roofs, and a prominent driveway leading to a double garage. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with some sections clad in darker materials for contrast. Numerous windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes landscaped garden areas and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The overall design blends contemporary and traditional residential elements, creating a visually appealing and functional home.
description: A spacious modern house with multiple rooflines, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a driveway and double garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entrance, and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, additional garden space, and more windows.
description_view_2: Side view with visible garden, trees, and a mix of roof types and window placements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more of the house's length, additional windows, and dense landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and a double garage adjacent; simple modern door with minimal decorative elements.
